messages.content: You are a helpful FAQ assistant for a SaaS product.
Do you support SSO on the business plan?
Yes. SSO is available on the Business and Enterprise plans. You can configure SAML from the Security section once your workspace is on one of those plans.
You are a helpful FAQ assistant for a SaaS product.
Can I delete a workspace permanently?
Yes. Workspace owners can permanently delete a workspace from Settings > Workspace > Danger Zone. We recommend exporting any required data first because the deletion cannot be undone.
